title: Wang Clan
content:
This was the original Wang Clan that lived in the Country of Zhao on Planet Suzaku. The clan consisted entirely of mortals, although some possessed talent in cultivation.

Most of the clan was butchered by Teng Huayuan after Wang Lin killed his grandson Teng Li. However, Wang Lin and Wang Tian Yu's family, survived as they were away from the clan at the time. Wang Zhou and Wang Hao were spared because of their relation with the Xuan Dao Sect. Wang Tian Yu, A.K.A Fourth Uncle, was saved by the Expert from Piao Miao Sect helping Teng Huayuan.

Wang Tian Yu re-established the Wang Clan into one of the Dynasty's noble family after becoming a vassal of the royal family.

Years after Wang Lin kills Teng Huayuan, with Wang Lin's backing, the reincarnated Wang Zhou make the Wang Clan the royal family of the Great Wang Dynasty.
